Try Demo Get Started
INTEGRATION

Scoold + Mattermost

Self-hosted chat meets self-hosted knowledge base.

If your organization runs Mattermost for secure, self-hosted chat, Scoold is the perfect companion for knowledge management. Both run on your infrastructure — complete data sovereignty.

Integration highlights

Incoming Webhooks

Scoold posts new questions and answers to configured Mattermost channels via incoming webhooks.

Slash Commands

Ask questions from Mattermost and have them automatically posted to Scoold.

Full Self-hosted Stack

Mattermost + Scoold = a completely self-hosted communication and knowledge management stack.

How to set it up

  1. 1

    Create an Incoming Webhook in Mattermost

  2. 2

    Add the webhook URL in your Scoold Pro configuration

  3. 3

    Create a Slash Command in Mattermost pointing to your Scoold instance

  4. 4

    Test by posting a question from Mattermost

Need detailed setup instructions? Read the documentation →

Ready to build your team's knowledge base?

Join thousands of organizations using Scoold to capture and share knowledge effectively. Start free, scale when you're ready.

Download Free View Live Demo
